interactive.rationale: Some controls present but limited or no script wiring — interactivity feels under-built.

design_system.rationale: Design-system audit: contains 4 raw hex colour token(s) instead of the design-system variables.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: Some failure-mode signalling, but the page largely sticks to the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Wire the controls to live behaviour
openQuestions.detail: Controls exist but don't appear to drive a live readout. Hook each control to an event listener that re-renders the demo and shows the resulting state.

openQuestions.title: Add a direct spec link
openQuestions.detail: References list only points back to the feature index or ChromeStatus. Add a direct link to the relevant spec (W3C draft, WICG explainer, or RFC) so readers can reach the normative source in one click.

openQuestions.title: Resolve a design-system finding
openQuestions.detail: The page contains 4 raw hex colour token(s) instead of the design-system variables. CLAUDE.md rules #5/#6/#7 require CSS variables, paired button background+color overrides, and zero static-card patterns.

openQuestions.title: Surface more failure modes
openQuestions.detail: Add a visible branch for the cases this feature can fail in: API missing, permission denied, invalid input, quota exceeded, etc. Right now an unsuccessful call would silently no-op.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 4 follow-up question(s) remain.
